policy.command_output_policy: stdout/stderr are not written verbatim to gate evidence.

gates.name: privacy
gates.summary: Gate and latest recognizable reports do not contain collected raw query/case terms or forbidden raw fields.

internal_basic_search.reason: Internal basic search is blocked by one or more main-chain gates.

external_gray.reason: External gray is blocked by main-chain, eval, runtime, rollback, performance, or privacy gates.

new_rerank.reason: No positive new-rerank evidence was produced.

db_note.reason: DB smoke failed/degraded. This does not block search-only release decisions here, but it blocks any next version that requires history, feedback, favorites, or durable events.
